creator: c.kworr@gmail.com
text:
Any updates on this one? Probably its outdated after #195359.

Right now script fails for me with:

/libexec/resolvconf/unbound: cannot create /var/unbound/forward.conf: Operation not permitted
Cannot 'reload' local_unbound. Set local_unbound_enable to YES in /etc/rc.conf or use 'onereload' instead of 'reload'.

I'm on FreeBSD 10-STABLE and vpnc-scripts-20150315. I'm using bind locally.
